description: Building block that performs initial character generation.

description: Assigns a level to the character.

description: Increments wizard class level; grants proficiencies at level 1 and ASI at 4/8/12/16/19.

description: Adds one level to a specific class.

description: Container for multiple level up operations.

description: Prioritizes maxing the highest priority stat before choosing other feats.

description: Chooses Ability Score Improvement only if the highest priority stat is not maxed.

priority.description: Ability score priority order for determining which stat to check

description: Assigns a name to the character.

description: A building block that applies no changes to the blueprint.

description: Resolves stat choices based on a priority order.
